expectations.text: Covers security, compatibility, code quality areas
expectations.evidence: Table includes items categorized under 보안 (security: BP-01 to BP-05), 호환성 (compatibility: BP-06 to BP-10), and 코드품질 (code quality: BP-11 to BP-14). Scope determination section also explains why each area is N/A.

expectations.text: Lists BP-coded items or equivalent checklist
expectations.evidence: Full table listing BP-01 through BP-14 with code, area, item name, result, and findings columns. Also references the guide.md for the full best practices framework.

Each BP item shows result '—' (N/A). Verification section confirms: 'All items BP-01 through BP-14 have been evaluated -- none skipped. Zero fail items found. All evaluated items are N/A due to no web files in the changeset.'

suggestions: Output includes a verification checklist (Step 5) which adds confidence in completeness. Good practice.
eval_feedback.overall: Perfect adherence to the best-practices skill format. All BP items listed, properly categorized, with clear N/A results and a verification section.
